notes: Next now exposes a catch-all /api/[...path] proxy for unmapped public routes.
Backend now exposes /api/news and legacy /api/earnings routes alongside existing v2 mounts.
Research UI placeholders now fail transparently instead of implying cache warmup.
Response-level cache added at route layer to eliminate repeated enrichment cost.

remaining_truthful_states.opportunities: No opportunities are currently present in the snapshot.
remaining_truthful_states.earnings_next_report_time: Awaiting earnings release when report time is absent.
remaining_truthful_states.missing_research_metrics: Displayed as Data unavailable or No historical data, depending on panel.

root_fixes_completed: Missing public /api/v5/chart contract fixed through universal Next proxy.
Broken /api/earnings public contract replaced with real historical earnings data.
Legacy fake chart fallback candles removed from V2 chart route.
Frontend /api/v2/news usage removed in favor of /api/news.
Research UI no longer claims data is warming when data is actually unavailable.
